sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_diff_test (start_time DateTime64(3), end_time DateTime64(3));
SELECT timeDiff(start_time, end_time) AS seconds_difference FROM time_diff_test;
UPDATE time_diff_test SET end_time = toDateTime64('2023-10-01 12:10:00', 3) WHERE start_time = toDateTime64('2023-10-01 12:00:00', 3);
SELECT timeDiff(start_time, end_time) AS updated_difference FROM time_diff_test WHERE start_time = toDateTime64('2023-10-01 12:00:00', 3);
